title: fsl-mcp sync: expose the v10 format/CST + conformance surface
manager: Keep fsl-mcp current with v10. Byte-level reversibility (CST + format) and the conformance/portability contract land, so the MCP should expose an fsl_format tool and report conformance so agents author portable, canonically-formatted machines.
cs: Add fsl_format(source)->formatted via the v10 format verb; surface conformance-vector results; keep tool output canonical.
